title: Remote download progress jumps to ~80% then crawls
description: Remote (RunPod) model install bar pops to ~80% instantly then crawls; fix denominator + hold indeterminate until real totals known.
activeSessionTitle: Owned by MPI-97 session. Fixed: (1) 'sits at 100%' aggregation via _depDenominator seed floor; (2) post-uninstall 36/36+partial contradiction = keep-uninstall deleting per-model custom_node + byte-only bar. Live-verified 2026-06-16 (4 concurrent installs, no 100%-sit). App-side, no image.
